note: Two web-only additions. (A) Explorer dashboard: new CIRCULATING SUPPLY card next to TOTAL SUPPLY (= total - gold_vault - popc_pool - dtd_distributed) and new DTD LOTTERY BALANCE card next to POPC POOL BALANCE (total SOST distributed via the V11-Phase-2 lottery since block #7,100). Both cards populate from a silent background DTD scan triggered 3 s after DOMContentLoaded (no user click required); during the scan they show 'scanning…' / 'background scan in progress…' and refresh to live values when _dtdCache is ready. (B) Protocol Registry page: the Registration Guide section is rewritten to explain BOTH methods clearly. Method A (Wallet UI, recommended, direct link to sost-wallet.html) walks through the Compose form + Open Note capsule type dropdown + Sign & Broadcast flow. Method B (sost-cli, for operators / scripts / CI-CD) keeps the existing CLI worked example. A shared Step 1 (SHA-256 of the manifesto + capsule text composition) and a shared After Publishing section (independent verification recipe) frame both methods so the on-chain record is bit-identical regardless of which path the publisher uses. Web only. NO consensus / src / include / scripts / tests changes.
release_note: Explorer dashboard — split the CIRCULATING SUPPLY metric in two. New 'CIRCULATING SUPPLY' (berenjena #6B3F6B) shows the TRUE circulating = total − gold vault − popc pool (includes DTD lottery payouts since those are in winners' wallets). Renamed the previous card to 'CIRCULATING MINING' (red, same formula as before: total − vault − pool − lottery, miner-side share). Both populated deterministically per tip from consensus constants, no scan required.
